channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-10
item.description: Ongoing conflicts in Iran and Ukraine dominate global news, while a tragic bus fire in Switzerland and a significant WWII bomb discovery in Germany also make headlines.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-10
item.description: The ongoing crisis in the Strait of Hormuz raises significant concerns for global oil markets and economic stability amid geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-10
item.description: Ford is enhancing its commercial fleet operations with a new AI-powered service, while a judge has ruled against Perplexity's AI agents shopping on Amazon.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-10
item.description: Luka Dončić faces a custody battle, while NFL free agency sees significant trades and signings, including Geno Smith to the Jets and Romeo Doubs to the Patriots.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-10
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include new insights into cosmic voids, dinosaur evolution, and potential cancer treatments, highlighting ongoing advancements in various fields of research.
